save_load_roundtrip.summary: Hidden-CDB save->load->save roundtrip on the stable candidate: run A loads slot 0 via the game's natural menu route and force-calls saveGame(7); run B naturally loads slot 7 back through the load menu and force-calls saveGame(8). save/7.dat and save/8.dat are byte-identical (sha256 91dea973...), proving the full 586398-byte gameData block survives the load path with zero state drift.

SURFDUMP_LOADSAVE selected_arg=7 (run B natural slot-7 load)
